commit_message:
Update pkgdown.yaml

Only run at publication step

Use dev version of SticsRFiles for tests

Packages are developed synchronously so tests in the dev version of croplotr should use the dev version of SticsRFiles. 
SticsRFiles is now suggested at release version for users (from previous commit).

Update pkgdown.yaml

Only run at publication step
Added checks of simulated and observed data
fix: searching if the OS specific stics fortran exe name exists in the preference.xml file (whole word search)
fix: adapting and checking files selection according to nbplantes value
